content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09C_temp` for all records where the tour starts with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA"`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.

4. Join `J09C_temp` with the `EABLG` table using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the table with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09C`.
   Use exactly these column names in this order:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   Use `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09C_temp` for all records where the tour starts with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "KSA"`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `ENTSCHEIDUNG = "EVU"`.

4. Join `J09C_temp` with the `EABLG` table using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the table with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09C`.
   Use exactly these column names in this order:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   Use `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;

# Table: process_rules

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS AS HAUS, t.ANLAGE AS ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID AS ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR AS EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1 AS HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR;

args.email: Please find attached the J09C meter readings export CSV.
